mapper.select:
SELECT s.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, c.category_name AS categoryName, i.item_name AS itemName, s.price AS price, s.billing_cycle AS billingCycle, DATE(s.start_date) AS startDate, DATE(s.created_at) AS createdAt, s.use_yn AS useYn,
CASE WHEN pm.card_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(ca.card_company, '(', pm.card_name, ')') ELSE pm.custom_card_company END AS paymentMethodName,
CASE WHEN s.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN CASE WHEN STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(CURDATE()), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(CURDATE())) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= CURDATE() THEN STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(CURDATE()), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(CURDATE())) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ELSE STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), '-', LPAD(MONTH(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY(LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) END
WHEN s.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN CASE WHEN STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY( LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-01' ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ) ) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= CURDATE() THEN STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY( LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()), '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-01' ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ) ) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ELSE STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()) + 1, '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-', LPAD( LEAST( DAY(s.start_date), DAY( LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT( YEAR(CURDATE()) + 1, '-', LPAD(MONTH(s.start_date), 2, '0'), '-01' ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) ) ) ), 2, '0' ) ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) END END AS nextPaymentDate
FROM add_subscription s JOIN subscription_item i ON s.item_id = i.item_id JOIN subscription_category c ON i.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN payment_method pm ON s.payment_id = pm.payment_id LEFT JOIN card ca ON pm.card_id = ca.card_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT s.subscription_id, i.category_id, s.item_id, s.price, s.billing_cycle, s.start_date, s.payment_id FROM add_subscription s JOIN subscription_item i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND s.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT s.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, sc.category_name AS categoryName, si.item_name AS itemName, s.price AS price, s.billing_cycle AS billingCycle, DATE(s.start_date) AS startDate, s.use_yn AS useYn, s.created_at AS createdAt, pm.payment_id AS payment_method_id, CASE WHEN pm.card_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.card_company, '(', pm.card_name, ')') ELSE pm.custom_card_company END AS payment_method_name FROM add_subscription s JOIN subscription_item si ON s.item_id = si.item_id JOIN subscription_category sc ON si.category_id = sc.category_id LEFT JOIN payment_method pm ON s.payment_id = pm.payment_id LEFT JOIN card c ON pm.card_id = c.card_id WHERE s.subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO add_subscription ( user_id, item_id, payment_id, price, billing_cycle, start_date, use_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{request.itemId}, #{request.paymentId}, #{request.price}, #{request.billingCycle}, #{request.startDate}, 'Y', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE add_subscription SET item_id = #{request.itemId}, payment_id = #{request.paymentId}, price = #{request.price}, billing_cycle = #{request.billingCycle}, start_date = #{request.startDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
